title: FOREKNOWLEDGE CLASSIFICATION ANALYSIS
executiveSummary: This report establishes a four-tier foreknowledge classification framework for distinguishing premeditated conspirators from potentially innocent participants. The framework is critical for case integrity and avoidance of defamation exposure.

sections.title: CLASSIFICATION FRAMEWORK
paragraphs: The system uses a four-tier classification to distinguish premeditated conspirators from potentially innocent participants.

rows: Multiple independent documentary proofs of actual knowledge
At least one direct documentary proof of awareness
Participated but no proof of knowledge

sections.title: TIER A ASSESSMENTS
paragraphs: Three individuals meet the Tier A threshold with multiple independent documentary proofs.

rows: SF10 FNB Letter, Sage accounts, Shopify organogram
SF10 identity fraud, De Novo email, Sage lockout, SF15 false report
